display_information.name: CornerCheck
display_information.description: Fail-closed fighter-clearance agent: suspensions, return windows, audit trail.
display_information.long_description: CornerCheck helps fight-operations teams, matchmakers, and athletic commissions confirm whether a fighter is safe and cleared to compete. It checks curated, source-cited cross-jurisdiction medical suspension records, enforces Association of Ringside Physicians return-to-competition windows, surfaces injury mentions from your own Slack with permalink citations, and refuses to clear when fighter identity is ambiguous. Decision support only: a human always makes the final call, and every decision lands in a tamper-evident audit ledger.

assistant_view.assistant_description: Ask whether a fighter is cleared to compete. I check suspensions, return windows, and your team's own injury chatter, and I refuse to clear ambiguous identities.

suggested_prompts.title: Check a fighter
suggested_prompts.message: Is Dragan Petrovic cleared for Saturday's card in Texas?

suggested_prompts.title: Why was someone refused?
suggested_prompts.message: Show me the audit trail for the last clearance decision.

suggested_prompts.title: Scan for injury chatter
suggested_prompts.message: Any injury mentions about our roster this week?
